market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to this unique 4-bedroom home in Leeds' bustling city center, offering ample space for up to 12 guests. With private parking included, you'll avoid the hassle of navigating crowded city streets. The entire property is available for your group's exclusive use, perfect for families or friends seeking both comfort and convenience. Located at a £675.40 rate (337% above market average), this listing's premium positioning demands a compelling narrative about why this space justifies the price - luxury finishes, proximity to must-see attractions, or exceptional host support. Parking Sleeps 12
analysis.photo_order_rec: The cover photo should be the exterior showing access to parking and proximity to Leeds Center to immediately communicate location value
key_diagnosis: £675.40 rate is +337% vs cohort median £154.60 but occupancy remains below market
Current title exceeds 50 characters, reducing SEO visibility
No amenities explicitly listed despite hosting in a highly competitive market
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £675.40 rate is +337% vs the Leeds median £154.60, yet occupancy is just 23.9% vs 47.8% - we can fix this.
